## Don’t Let Online Orders Die on the Pass

Defend digital orders from payment fraud, promo abuse, and chargebacks before they impact your customers, kitchen, or bottom line.

![save-your-online-orders](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201485%201215'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

With Sift, fraud prevention and loss reduction became effortless. Instead of ChowNow applying additional resources to adjust to fraudulent actors, Sift changed the entire dynamic so fraudsters were forced to adjust to our new environment.

John Page

Merchant Processing Director at ChowNow

## Rely on Fraud Protection that Fits Your Food & Delivery Business

Cut operating costs and empower lean fraud teams with high-productivity automation, rapid operational integration, efficient and predictable spend, and support from a partner with proven industry expertise.

![food-and-delivery-fraud-shield](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20990%20810'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Frequently Asked Questions

## What types of fraud affect food and delivery businesses most?

Food and delivery platforms face unique fraud challenges including payment fraud, account takeover (ATO), promo abuse, and chargeback fraud. Each of these not only cuts into profit margins but can also erode customer trust if not addressed proactively.

## How can fraud prevention improve customer experience in food delivery?

Effective fraud prevention reduces false declines, prevents order delays, and ensures legitimate customers enjoy fast, frictionless ordering. By stopping fraud before it reaches the kitchen or driver, restaurants and delivery platforms can deliver hospitality at speed and scale without sacrificing security.

## Why is identity trust important for food and delivery fraud protection?

Identity trust goes beyond traditional verification by analyzing customer behavior and digital signals across millions of transactions. For food and delivery businesses, this helps distinguish between trusted customers and fraudsters in real time, reducing chargebacks and operational costs while safeguarding revenue.
